case_title: MEI YI SHI VS. JOHN H PEOPLES et al

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHI, MEI YI AS TO DEFENDANT PEOPLES, JOHN H DOES 1 TO 25, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-03-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-01-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-18-2003

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT.
